section.heading: Definitions

content.p: As used in this subchapter, the terms “mortgage”, “first mortgage”, “mortgagee”, “mortgagor”, “maturity date”, and “State” shall have the same meaning as in section 1707 of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (June 27, 1934, ch. 847, title IX, § 901, as added Sept. 1, 1951, ch. 378, title II, § 201, 65 Stat. 295.)
